description_long: This is a rounded, white ceramic vase with a slightly flared rim and a broad, stable base. The surface is mostly smooth and glossy, with some small spots and minor discolorations visible, indicating age or use. One side of the vase features a detailed blue decorative motif, including floral elements and a central cartouche with the inscription 'CYNOSBAT'. The blue design is intricate, with stylized leaves, scrolls, and possibly birds, giving the vase a classic, antique appearance. The rest of the vase is plain, with only a few scattered marks and no additional ornamentation. The interior appears hollow and dark, suitable for holding flowers or other items.
description: A rounded, white ceramic vase with a glossy finish and blue decorative motifs, including an ornate inscription. The vase shows minor wear and has a broad, stable base.
description_view_0: The vase appears plain white with a glossy surface and minor spots, showing no visible decoration from this angle.
description_view_1: A partial view of the blue decorative motif and inscription begins to appear on the right side, with the rest of the vase remaining plain.
description_view_2: The front displays the full blue decorative motif and the 'CYNOSBAT' inscription, framed by ornate floral and scrollwork designs.
description_view_3: The blue motif is partially visible on the left, with most of the vase's surface plain and white, showing some minor marks.
